source_formulae: P0R03250: VII. Field Generation and Upward Causality (Topological Defects)
P0R03251: Upward causality is formalised using Topological Quantum Field Theory (TQFT).

P0R03252: Mechanism: Complex physical configurations (L1-4) act as Topological Defects (e.g., vortices) within the Psi-field. | Field Generation: These defects source the higher-order fields. The emergence of the Self (L5) is the formation of a stable topological defect (soliton) generated by biological coherence (L4).

source_formulae: P0R03253: VIII. The Combination Problem and Panpsychist Fusion (Quantum Mereology)
P0R03254: The Combination Problem is resolved via Panpsychist Fusion, formalised using Quantum Mereology.

P0R03255: Fusion Condition: Two systems fuse into a unified whole (SAB) when entanglement and Integrated Information () exceed the sum of their parts: AB>A+B. | Mechanism: The Psi-field (Gauge Field) mediates the entanglement required for fusion, facilitated by UPDE synchronisation.
